financial_pages.notes: Page is titled 'Selected Financial Data' and presents a multi-year financial summary covering several fiscal years (FY2016-FY2025). Detailed line items include profit attributable to ITOCHU, total assets, total equity, ROE, ROA, EPS, dividends per share, and cash flows. Specific values were not legibly captured in the rendered PNG; users should refer to the source PDF for line-item granularity. Marked as company-actual financial highlights table in JPY.

Re-extracted via pdftotext from p48 'Selected Financial Data' table. FYE = fiscal year ending March 31. ITOCHU adopted IFRS 17 retroactively for FYE 2023+. 'Net profit attributable to ITOCHU' is the canonical net income; 'Revenues' is canonical top line. Core profit shown in millions (originally billions in source); converted: 770.3B = 770,300M. Original p048 entry had empty values; this new entry replaces that data via text extraction.
Conceptual diagram of ITOCHU's value creation process and integrated reporting framework (Enhancement of Corporate Value, Lower Cost of Capital, Increase Growth Rate). No financial figures.

metrics.name: Investment-related (Equity-method investments, Other investments, Goodwill, intangibles)

financial_pages.notes: Recovered via balance-sheet-recovery pass; source PDF page 18 (Balance Sheet (End of March 2025)). FY2024 = fiscal year ended March 31, 2025. Values approximated to 0.1 trillion in chart; precise total assets 15,134.264 billion yen and shareholders' equity 5,755.072 billion yen taken from p48 11-year table. TL=Current+Non-current liabilities; TE=Shareholders' equity + Non-controlling interests. Figures reconcile within rounding (TL+TE ≈ 8.9+6.3 = 15.2T vs TA 15.1T).

people_pages.notes: Outside directors' commentary on board activities, including coverage of the privatization of DESCENTE LTD.

people.name: Fumihiko Kobayashi
people.role: Chief Administrative Officer (CAO), Member of the Board, Executive Vice President
people.notes: Discussed the announcement of the Management Policy 'The Brand-new Deal,' policies for FY 2025, gender pay gap, and ITOCHU-introduced special measures to appoint a certain number of female Executive Officers, providing them with special opportunities to gain experience in Companywide management. Targets ratio of female Executive Officers reaching 20%.

people_pages.page_section: Corporate Governance - Establishment and Enhancement of a Governance System
people_pages.notes: Narrative on governance system focused on establishment and enhancement; covers structure of the Board of Directors and the Audit & Supervisory Board (5 directors and 5 Audit & Supervisory Board Members; 50% outside directors / 60% outside Audit & Supervisory Board members), Skill Matrix and committee composition. No individual director listing.

people_pages.notes: Discusses succession planning to enhance the sustainability of corporate value and identification/succession of management talent, with mention of CEO selection process and policy on training CEO candidates.
